                             +-------------+   +----------+
                            >|  Transform  +-+>|  Output  |
                             +-------------+ | +----------+
+---------+  +-----------+   |               |
|  Input  |->|  Process  +---+               |
+---------+  +-----------+   |               |
                             |               |
                             +------------+  |
                            >|  Validate  +--+
                             +------------+
